tool_input.query: reconnection Cassini Saturn magnetotail survey intervals events
surveyed intervals reconnection Cassini Saturn tail
Cassini Saturn tail interval reconnection event list

tool_input.summary: I could not find any PDS (PDS3 or PDS4) dataset that explicitly contains a Cassini Saturn magnetotail ‘survey interval list’ or a derived ‘reconnection(-related) event catalog’ from which the number of identified events could be read directly. The PDS holdings I found are the underlying Cassini plasma/fields instrument archives (MAG, MIMI, CAPS, RPWS) that you would use to reproduce such a survey, but they do not encode the survey’s event count in their catalog metadata.

candidates.title: Cassini Magnetometer Calibrated Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Primary calibrated MAG time series used to identify magnetotail reconnection signatures (e.g., dipolarizations, plasmoids) during Saturn-tail intervals.

candidates.title: Cassini Magnetometer Raw Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Raw MAG data (highest fidelity) that could be reprocessed/checked for reconnection signatures in the surveyed tail intervals.

candidates.title: Cassini MIMI Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Energetic particle observations often used alongside MAG to interpret reconnection-related events (plasmoids, injections) in Saturn’s tail.

candidates.title: Cassini-Huygens Plasma Spectrometer (CAPS) Calibrated Data Bundle
candidates.reasoning: Plasma moments/measurements used with MAG/MIMI to diagnose reconnection and tail dynamics; useful if the survey used CAPS context.

candidates.title: Cassini RPWS Electron Densities from Upper Hybrid and Plasma Wave Frequencies
candidates.reasoning: Electron density product sometimes used to identify plasma sheet / lobe crossings and contextualize tail reconnection intervals.

candidates.title: CO E SW J S MAG 4 SUMM 1MINAVG V2.1
candidates.reasoning: PDS3-era Cassini MAG 1-minute averaged summary product; relevant if the original survey was performed using PDS3 MAG time series.

candidates.title: CO E SW J S MAG 4 SUMM 1SECAVG V2.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3-era Cassini MAG 1-second averaged summary product; appropriate for event-by-event reconnection signature searches at higher cadence.

candidates.title: CO S MIMI 4 INCA CALIB V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3-era calibrated MIMI/INCA energetic neutral atom/ion observations; often used for magnetotail dynamics context during reconnection.

candidates.title: CO S MIMI 4 CHEMS CALIB V1.0
candidates.reasoning: PDS3-era calibrated MIMI/CHEMS energetic ion composition; can support identification/characterization of reconnection-associated injections.

parts.content:
You are a dataset-discovery assistant for the NASA PDS catalog (atm, geo, img, naif, ppi, rms, sbn nodes, ~12k datasets).

Tools are provided via MCP. You MUST call at least one search tool before returning results.

Interpret the user's science question, infer the relevant mission(s) and instrument(s), then search using mission/instrument keywords — not raw science terms alone. Return both PDS4 and PDS3 versions when available. Only return candidates you've seen in tool results — never invent IDs. Stay under ~10 tool calls. If nothing matches, return an empty list.
How many reconnection related events were identified in the surveyed Cassini Saturn-tail intervals?

dataset.title: Cassini Magnetometer Calibrated Bundle
dataset.description: This bundle contains Cassini magnetometer calibrated data for the entire mission. The bundle includes 1 minute averaged and 1 second averaged data provided in Kronographic (KRTP, KSO, KSM) coordinates at Saturn, Geographic coordinates (GSE) for the Earth flyby, Jovigraphic coordinates for the Jupiter flyby, and RTN coordinates for the entire mission, and full time resolution data provided in RTN coordinates for cruise, Kronographic (KRTP) coordinates for Saturn Tour, Geographic coordinates (GSE) for the Earth flyby,and IAU_Jupiter (J3) and JMAG XYZ (JMXYZ) for Outer Cruise. A spice metakernel collection for the 1 minute averaged data is provided as well.
